steps: Go to https://iot.tuya.com and sign up or log in to the Tuya IoT Platform
In the left sidebar, click Cloud > Development
Fill in the project name, description, industry type, and data center region
After the project is created, click on it and open the 'Overview' tab
Your Access ID (Client ID) and Access Secret (Client Secret) are shown in the 'Authorization Key' section
Click the eye icon to reveal the Access Secret and copy both values

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: Access ID / Client ID
credential_fields.description: The Access ID of your Tuya cloud project, used to authenticate API calls

notes: Tuya uses a custom HMAC-SHA256 signature authentication — the Access Secret is used to sign requests, not passed directly
Free developer tier available with limited API call quota
Choose the correct data center region (US, EU, CN, IN) during project creation — this affects the API base URL
US region base URL: https://openapi.tuyaus.com, EU: https://openapi.tuyaeu.com, CN: https://openapi.tuyacn.com
Devices must be linked to your cloud project via the Tuya Smart app before they appear in the API
